ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in MB */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "resolution_width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "resolution_height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the image */,
  "category" TEXT /* High-level category of the image */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated tags for additional metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "parent_label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent label */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Average confidence score of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_labels" (
  "image_label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image-label association */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the label for the specific image */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who annotated the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_labels_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_labels_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification result */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for classification */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification was performed */,
  "confidence_scores" TEXT /* JSON string of confidence scores for top-k labels */,
  "topk0" INTEGER /* Top-k label ID for the 1st highest classification score */,
  "topk1" INTEGER /* Top-k label ID for the 2nd highest classification score */,
  "topk2" INTEGER /* Top-k label ID for the 3rd highest classification score */,
  "topk3" INTEGER /* Top-k label ID for the 4th highest classification score */,
  "topk4" INTEGER /* Top-k label ID for the 5th highest classification score */,
  "topk5" INTEGER /* Top-k label ID for the 6th highest classification score */,
  "topk6" INTEGER /* Top-k label ID for the 7th highest classification score */,
  "topk7" INTEGER /* Top-k label ID for the 8th highest classification score */,
  "topk8" INTEGER /* Top-k label ID for the 9th highest classification score */,
  "topk9" INTEGER /* Top-k label ID for the 10th highest classification score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or application used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "test_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for testing */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
